description: Full-bleed immersive video hero. The background video plays in a continuous, muted loop of black-tie event highlights. Centered text content features a massive H1 in bold sans-serif, with the word 'EXCELLENCE' highlighted in Champagne Gold italic serif. A primary CTA button sits below, using a 'shimmer' effect that moves across the gold border every 5 seconds. A scroll-down indicator (thin gold line) pulses at the bottom center.
